RunToolCall.title: 建立 api_trace 和 interrupt_events 表

kind.StringValue:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS api_trace (
  seq INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  phase TEXT,
  label TEXT,
  method TEXT,
  url TEXT,
  request_headers_sanitized TEXT,
  request_body TEXT,
  http_status INTEGER,
  response_headers_sanitized TEXT,
  response_body_truncated TEXT,
  response_time_ms INTEGER,
  timestamp TEXT,
  notes TEXT
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS interrupt_events (
  seq INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  event_index INTEGER,
  event_type TEXT,
  prompt_text TEXT,
  options_json TEXT,
  input_type TEXT,
  raw_event_json TEXT,
  observed_at TEXT
);

EmbeddedTool.comment: 建立 api_trace 和 interrupt_events 表

Text.text: 工具创建完毕。现在先建立数据库 schema，然后开始阶段 A。

Text.text:
**Failed to create agent.**

The attempt to set up a new agent with the service did not succeed. It returned a 'Not Found' error, meaning the specific endpoint or resource wasn't available.

> Key issue: Resource not found (404 status).

ToolOutputSummary.title: Attempt to create agent failed with 'not found' error

Text.text:
**Request for agent information failed.**

The attempt to retrieve a list of agents resulted in a 'Not Found' error, meaning the requested information is not available at the expected location.

> No agent data was returned.

ToolOutputSummary.title: Failed to retrieve agent list (not found)

Text.text:
## API Specification Retrieved

The documentation for an AI agent API was fetched successfully. It describes various endpoints and data structures for tasks like managing API keys, processing user goals, and batch handling of CSV files.

### Key Features
- **API Keys**: Create, list, delete, and validate keys.
- **Goal Processing**: Analyze goals to extract URLs and generate titles.
- **Batch Processing**: Analyze CSVs for variables, propose prompt templates, and generate prompts from CSV data.

> This API supports AI-driven tasks such as CSV analysis using GPT-4o and customized prompt generation.

ToolOutputSummary.title: Fetched documentation for the AI agent API

Text.text:
# API Documentation Page Retrieved

The request successfully fetched the interactive documentation page for the AI Agent API.

> This is a Swagger UI page titled 'AI Agent API - Swagger UI', which loads the API specification from `/openapi.json` to display endpoints, parameters, and examples interactively.

The page includes standard styling, favicon, and JavaScript for a user-friendly interface to explore the API.

ToolOutputSummary.title: Successfully retrieved the interactive AI Agent API documentation page

RunToolCall.title: 提取 openapi 路径清单

ExecuteJs.comment: 提取 openapi 路径清单

Text.text:
重要发现：openapi.json 显示 api.twin.so 的公开 REST API **不包含** `/v1/agents` 相关的任何端点。可用 paths 只有：`/`, `/apikey`, `/apikey/{id}`, `/apikeys`, `/auth/health`, `/auth/validate`, `/goal-processing/batch/*`, `/goal-processing/process`。

这是这个实验要回答的核心问题的**第一个关键发现**——"通过公开 REST API 能否闭合 present_options 回路"的真实答案显然是：公开 REST API 根本没有暴露 agent run 相关的端点。

让我查看完整 openapi 确认，并探测用户任务书里列的具体路径，这些也需要记录下来（它们全部 404）。

ToolCallStarted.title: 提取 openapi 路径清单

ExecuteJs.comment: 提取 openapi 路径清单
